Stub for the `window_schedule_render` function in the Pebble firmware UI window module.

# Purpose
This C header file defines a function prototype for [`window_schedule_render`](<#window_schedule_render>), which takes a pointer to a `Window` structure as its parameter. The function is currently implemented as an empty function, indicating that it is a placeholder for future functionality related to scheduling a render operation for a window. The file includes a private header, `window_private.h`, from the `applib/ui` directory, suggesting that it is part of a user interface application library. The use of `#pragma once` ensures that the file is included only once in a single compilation, preventing duplicate definitions.
